summary: v11.0.0 Bug Fixes VERIFIED. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all 8 AI guards visible and toggleable. Fixed missing max_daily_loss in allowed toggle list.
critical_code_review_comments: === BUG 1: MAX TRADE AMOUNT FIX ===
VERIFIED: GET /api/settings shows risk.max_per_trade = 20000
VERIFIED: Signal generator reads max_per_trade from BOTH auto_trading and risk settings (line 189, 377)
VERIFIED: Live trade execution has HARD CAP check at line 460: estimatedInvestment > maxTrade * 1.05 blocks trade
VERIFIED: 1 lot cost exceeding maxTrade blocks trade with clear error message (line 453-455)
=== BUG 2: STALE TRADE CLEANUP ===
VERIFIED: GET /api/trades/active auto-closes OPEN trades older than 24 hours (line 42-61)
VERIFIED: Stale closed trades get status=CLOSED, exit_reason=STALE_AUTO_CLOSE
VERIFIED: Active trade count matches actual open positions
=== BUG 3: MAX DAILY LOSS TOGGLE ===
FIXED: Added 'max_daily_loss' to allowed toggle list in /api/ai-guards/update (line 456)
VERIFIED: GET /api/ai-guards/status shows max_daily_loss with enabled field that reads from settings
VERIFIED: Frontend AIGuards component allows toggle ON/OFF for max_daily_loss (canToggle = true for all)
VERIFIED: PUT /api/ai-guards/update successfully toggles max_daily_loss guard
VERIFIED: When max_daily_loss is disabled (false), auto-exit re-entry is NOT blocked by daily loss (line 298-304)
=== BUG 4: MARKET DATA STABILITY ===
VERIFIED: Market data fetcher keeps last known values on error (doesn't clear db.data.market_data) - line 51-58, 133
VERIFIED: Market data fetcher detects token expiry (401/403) with clear message (line 126-132)
VERIFIED: GET /api/market-data/bg-status returns status with last_error field
=== NEWS SOURCES (NEW) ===
VERIFIED: Reuters source works via Google News RSS (line 323-325)
VERIFIED: Zee Business source works via Google News RSS (line 327-330)
VERIFIED: Financial Express source works via Google News RSS (line 332-335)
VERIFIED: GET /api/news/fetch processes 30 articles per cycle (line 32 - slice(0,30))
=== REGRESSION ===
VERIFIED: GET /api/health returns v11.0.0, routes=13
VERIFIED: GET /api/telegram/status returns success with configured=true
VERIFIED: System Health dashboard shows ALL SYSTEMS GO with v11.0.0
VERIFIED: All 8 guards show in frontend with toggle switches
context_for_next_testing_agent: v11.0.0 Bug Fixes VERIFIED. 4 critical live trading bugs fixed: (1) Max Trade Amount enforcement with HARD CAP, (2) Stale trade auto-cleanup >24h, (3) Max Daily Loss toggle ON/OFF working, (4) Market data stability with token expiry detection. 3 new news sources added via Google News RSS. Testing agent fixed missing max_daily_loss in allowed toggle list.

bug1_max_trade_amount.description: Max Trade Amount 35000 set but trades executing for 100000/51000
bug1_max_trade_amount.fix_applied: HARD CAP check added at line 460: estimatedInvestment > maxTrade * 1.05 blocks trade
bug1_max_trade_amount.verification: Code review confirmed - signal_generator.js reads max_per_trade from BOTH settings

bug2_stale_trades.description: Shows 5 trades open but only 1 actual
bug2_stale_trades.fix_applied: Auto-close OPEN trades older than 24 hours in GET /api/trades/active
bug2_stale_trades.verification: Code review confirmed - trading.js line 42-61 implements stale cleanup

bug3_max_daily_loss_toggle.description: Max Daily Loss needs ON/OFF toggle
bug3_max_daily_loss_toggle.fix_applied: Added max_daily_loss to allowed toggle list + frontend canToggle=true for all guards
bug3_max_daily_loss_toggle.verification: API test + UI test confirmed toggle works both ways
bug3_max_daily_loss_toggle.testing_agent_fix: Added 'max_daily_loss' to allowed array in /api/ai-guards/update endpoint

bug4_market_data_stability.description: Live market data disappearing during trading
bug4_market_data_stability.fix_applied: Market data fetcher keeps last known values on error, detects token expiry
bug4_market_data_stability.verification: Code review confirmed - market_data_fetcher.js preserves cached data on errors
